name: routing
description: Portable routing and dialogue conformance for low-touch edits, hands-off PR routing, grill, and crystallize

scenarios.name: low: single-file fix
scenarios.prompt: Fix the redirect helper in agent-suites/fixtures/sample-app/src/redirect.ts so it keeps query strings intact. Keep it hands-on and run the smallest useful validation.

judge: The agent treats the task as Low routing and performs a direct, scoped edit with focused validation

scenarios.name: medium: grill pressure-test
scenarios.prompt: Before implementation, pressure-test this design: the sample form should optimistically submit and then reconcile server validation errors.

judge: The agent uses grill-style pressure testing with concrete risks and branches before implementation

scenarios.name: medium: crystallize fuzzy idea
scenarios.prompt: I have a fuzzy idea: make our sample app feel more trustworthy when auth expires, but I am not sure what the actual product shape is.

judge: The agent mirrors the fuzzy intent, identifies assumptions, and shapes the idea before proposing implementation

scenarios.name: medium: pr routing block
scenarios.prompt: Draft a PR description for the sample form changes. Include a routing block first and do not edit files.

judge: The response starts with a hands-off routing block before the PR description and avoids file edits
